positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u15,axiom,
    vacuum != duster).

cnf(u13,axiom,
    vampire != duster).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    space != duster).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    suck(vacuum)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    ~suck(duster)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    suck(plunger)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    suck(vampire)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    vacuum != vampire).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    vampire != space).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    vacuum != space).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    plunger != space).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    plunger != duster).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    plunger != vacuum).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    plunger != vampire).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define vacuum(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define vampire(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
